Year: 1923
Section: Statistics of the Colony.
Type: statistics

1921 5,827,740 157,152 1,676,432 7,661,324

Governors of the Gold Coast (since 1900).

1900. Sir M. Nathan, K.C.M.G.
1904. Sir J. P. Rodger, K.C.M.G.
1910. J. J. Thorburn, Esq., C.M.G.
1912. Sir H. C. Clifford, K.C.M.G.
